# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [Unreleased]

### Added

- Travel Currency Budget Planner feature
- Budget reset options
- Database backup and restore
- Budget export (CSV, PDF, Excel)
- App lock with biometrics
- Loan management
- Emergency fund calculator
- Invoice dashboard and payables
- Financial tools (tip calculator, currency converter, etc.)

### Fixed

- Various bug fixes and improvements
- Currency display improvements
- Navigation drawer enhancements

## [1.0.0] - Initial Release

### Added

- Budget management (monthly budgets)
- Transaction tracking (income/expenses)
- Category management
- Recurring transactions
- Financial projections

---

For older releases, please refer to the git commit history.
